project: runts-ink: Maximize TS/TSX Coverage in HIR + Compile Path
goal: 100% of practical TS/TSX constructs supported in HIR representation and compile-path codegen, validated by Ink examples across all 3 environments (deno, runts dev, runts build) with 100% output match

architecture_decision.rationale: HIR interpreter removed entirely. Taffy removed entirely. Yoga is the same engine Ink uses internally, giving maximum layout parity. rquickjs is battle-tested ES2020. Minimum custom code = thin JS bridge + oxc/swc transpile + Yoga layout.
architecture_decision.dev_pipeline: TSX source -> oxc_parser -> oxc_codegen/swc -> JS bundle -> rquickjs context + js_bridge.rs -> VNode tree -> Yoga -> Ratatui
architecture_decision.compile_pipeline: TSX source -> HIR -> Rust codegen -> cargo build -> native binary

phases.name: Phase 0: Unblock
phases.description: Fix build. Re-enable linter. Split remaining god files.

phases.name: Phase 1: rquickjs + Yoga Engine
phases.description: Delete HIR runtime and Taffy. Wire rquickjs as sole dev engine. TSX->JS pipeline. Complete bridge.

phases.name: Phase 2: Compile + Verification
phases.description: Fix compile path. One parity harness. Per-example tests.

phases.name: Phase 3: Coverage Gaps
phases.description: Re-enable disabled spec tests. Add missing Ink examples. Verify bridge completeness.

phases.name: Phase 4: Cleanup + Future
phases.description: Delete dead code. Update docs. Evaluate Boa.

phases.name: Phase 5: Compile Path Hardening
phases.description: Fix quote_codegen to emit compilable Rust for core HIR constructs. Add compile-path tests.

phases.name: Phase 6: Example-Driven Feature Coverage
phases.description: Create Ink examples for every missing TS/TSX/React/Ink feature. Each example validates all 3 environments via parity harness with 100% output match.

phases.name: Phase 7: HIR & Parser Expansion
phases.description: Add missing HIR variants for TS features not yet represented. Update parser and codegen.

phases.name: Phase 8: Compile-Path Integration Tests
phases.description: Expand compile_codegen.rs to 50+ tests. Add compile-path parity tests. Add negative tests.

phases.name: Phase 9: Final Audit
phases.description: Build complete coverage matrix. Verify all P0 features work end-to-end. Document remaining gaps.

phases.name: Phase 10: Extended TS/TSX Coverage
phases.description: Additional Ink examples for TS/TSX features not yet exercised. Covers logical assignment, React 18 hooks, type declarations, module patterns, collections, and advanced type system features.

phases.name: Phase 11: Type System + Runtime API Deep Coverage
phases.description: Additional Ink examples for utility types, modern runtime APIs, React patterns, and advanced type system features not yet exercised.

phases.name: Phase 12: Runtime API + Type System Completion
phases.description: Final Ink examples for runtime APIs (JSON, Function, Object, Number, Error) and remaining type system features (function overloads, static blocks, private methods) not yet exercised.

phases.name: Phase 13: Real-World Validation (../tui1 Port)
phases.description: Tasks identified by attempting to compile the ../tui1 real-world Ink chat example. Covers missing bridge globals (process, Date, timers), JSX edge cases (fragments, pragmas), and dynamic import of node built-ins.

phases.name: Phase 14: Final Runtime API + Module Pattern Completion
phases.description: Additional Ink examples for remaining runtime APIs (console, URI encoding, array reduce, string search, error subclasses) and module patterns (namespace re-export, inline type imports, parameter properties) not yet exercised.

phases.name: Phase 15: Advanced React Patterns + Deep Runtime Coverage
phases.description: Ink examples for advanced React patterns (render props, HOCs, key/refs) and remaining runtime APIs (Symbol.iterator, ArrayBuffer, performance, structuredClone, arguments, RegExp named groups, string well-formed).

phases.name: Phase 16: Operator + Syntax + Runtime API Completion
phases.description: Final Ink examples for operators (in, void, comma, ++/--), syntax features (for-await-of, spread in calls, destructuring in params/catch/for-of), and remaining runtime APIs (Object.entries/values, Array static methods, Date/RegExp/Promise comprehensive methods, parseInt/parseFloat global).

phases.name: Phase 17: ES2024 + TypeScript 5.0+ Feature Completion
phases.description: Final Ink examples for ES2024 features (using/await using, import attributes, Array.fromAsync, Promise.withResolvers, Object.groupBy) and TypeScript 5.0+ features (const type parameters, accessor fields, satisfies expressions, type annotation in catch, iterator helpers, throw expressions).

phases.name: Phase 19: Tagged Templates + Compiler Options + Reflect Deep Coverage + ES2025
phases.description: Final Ink examples for tagged template literals, Function constructor, Object prototype/static methods, Reflect deep methods, tsconfig compiler options (paths, esModuleInterop, jsxFactory, strict mode, downlevelIteration, preserveConstEnums, moduleResolution), Web APIs (URL, TextEncoder, Headers), and ES2025 features (RegExp.escape, Set methods).

tasks.title: Fix quote_codegen.rs syntax error — unblock the build
tasks.acceptance: cargo build passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Re-enable build.rs linter and fix all violations
tasks.acceptance: build.rs uncommented, cargo build passes, linter reports 0 violations

tasks.title: DELETE src/hir_runtime.rs and all HIR interpreter code
tasks.acceptance: src/hir_runtime.rs deleted. All references to Interpreter, Value, render_tsx, RuntimeError removed. cargo build passes.

tasks.title: Build TSX->JS transpile pipeline using oxc_codegen
tasks.acceptance: Given .tsx, emit JS bundle: JSX -> React.createElement, TS types erased, 'ink' imports resolved to bridge globals. Bundle evals in rquickjs without errors.

tasks.title: Wire runts dev to execute JS bundle in rquickjs + render to string
tasks.acceptance: runts dev --once --plugin ratatui <example> transpiles TSX to JS, evals in rquickjs with bridge, prints rendered output matching deno.

tasks.title: Complete js_bridge.rs for all Ink features
tasks.acceptance: Bridge exports: Box, Text, Newline, Spacer, Static, Transform with all props used in examples. Unit tests for every prop.

tasks.title: Implement interactive hooks in js_bridge.rs + crossterm event loop
tasks.acceptance: useInput, useApp, useStdin, useStdout, useStderr, useWindowSize, useFocus, useFocusManager, useCursor, useAnimation wired through bridge. crossterm events routed to JS callbacks.

tasks.title: Fix compile path: typed plugin boundary + working binaries
tasks.acceptance: Plugin::codegen_module takes typed HIR. runts build --release on static examples produces working binary with expected output.

tasks.title: Create single canonical parity harness (deno vs rquickjs vs compile)
tasks.acceptance: Exactly one script. --env deno|rq|compile|all. Per-symbol diff. JSON summary. All 20+ old scripts deleted.

tasks.title: Add per-example unit tests for all examples
tasks.acceptance: One Rust test per example reading tui/app.tsx, running through rquickjs path, asserting expected strings. Coverage >=90%. 88 test slots across 91 examples (86 active + 2 ignored). 3 examples lack tests.

tasks.title: Delete dead code: runts-react, old scripts, HIR runtime, Taffy engine
tasks.acceptance: cargo build passes with zero dead-code warnings. Taffy feature and dep removed. Workspace clean. Yoga is sole layout engine.

tasks.title: Update all docs to reflect rquickjs + Yoga-only architecture
tasks.acceptance: All docs: HIR interpreter and Taffy removed. rquickjs is dev engine. Yoga is layout engine.

tasks.title: Evaluate Boa as long-term pure-Rust replacement for rquickjs
tasks.acceptance: Spike branch spike/boa with Boa. Report on binary size, startup time, interop, WASM feasibility. Decision documented in docs/ROADMAP.md.

tasks.title: Re-enable disabled spec test modules (control_flow, data_structures, vars_functions, jsx)
tasks.acceptance: All 15 modules uncommented and compiling. 864 tests passing, 0 failures, 99 ignored with documented reasons.

tasks.title: Fix or document stale HIR test failures
tasks.acceptance: cargo test --bin runts exits 0. No panics on Expr::Invalid. Every ignored test has a reason.

tasks.title: Add missing Ink examples for full feature coverage

tasks.title: Verify js_bridge.rs completeness against all used props
tasks.acceptance: All example-used props are in bridge. useRef and usePaste hooks implemented. All 91 examples pass rquickjs parity tests.

tasks.title: Fix compile-path codegen for control flow (for, switch, try/catch, throw, break/continue)
tasks.acceptance: for loops, switch, try/catch, throw, break/continue all produce compilable Rust. At least 5 compile-path integration tests added.

tasks.title: Fix compile-path codegen for expressions (template literals, logical ops, compound assign, spread, typeof)
tasks.acceptance: Template literals, logical ops, all 12 compound assign ops, array spread, typeof constant-folding all produce compilable Rust. At least 5 compile-path tests added.

tasks.title: Add compile-path integration tests that actually run cargo build
tasks.acceptance: tests/compile_codegen.rs exists with >=5 tests that run rustc --crate-type=lib on generated Rust. All tests pass.

tasks.title: ink-control-flow example — for, while, do-while, switch, break, continue

tasks.notes: The dev path (rquickjs) correctly executes all control flow constructs. The compile path generates compilable Rust but has limited expression support due to the codegen architecture.

tasks.title: Handle dynamic import of node built-ins
tasks.acceptance: import('node:readline') returns rejected Promise or stub in rquickjs. .then/.catch handlers execute. Compile path generates valid Rust. ../tui1 no longer crashes on dynamic import.

tasks.title: Handle /** @jsxImportSource react */ pragma
tasks.acceptance: JSX pragma comment handled by oxc_transformer. Generated JS uses correct JSX factory. ../tui1 renders correctly with pragma present.

callback refs / useRef with initial value

Array.prototype.push / pop / shift / unshift / splice / sort / reverse
Array.prototype.indexOf / lastIndexOf / every / some / filter / find / findIndex
Date.getTime / getFullYear / getMonth / getDate / toISOString / toUTCString
String.localeCompare / normalize / codePointAt / fromCodePoint / concat / charAt / charCodeAt
Object prototype methods (toString, valueOf, hasOwnProperty, propertyIsEnumerable, isPrototypeOf)
Object static methods (is, setPrototypeOf, getPrototypeOf, preventExtensions, isExtensible, isFrozen, isSealed, getOwnPropertyNames, getOwnPropertySymbols)
Reflect methods (apply, construct, defineProperty, deleteProperty, getOwnPropertyDescriptor, getPrototypeOf, setPrototypeOf, preventExtensions, isExtensible)

Set methods (intersection, union, difference, symmetricDifference, isSubsetOf, isSupersetOf, isDisjointFrom)
